description: Domestic-wine fixture corpus for measuring the current two-field (brand + alcohol) Slice 3 system. Evaluation-only: truth labels and expectations are never inputs to the extractor. Not statistically representative of all domestic-wine labels (see issue #15).

entries.sourceAuthority: Alcohol and Tobacco Tax and Trade Bureau
entries.knownAmbiguity: The brand mark is not cleanly recoverable from the artwork; the only clean 'M CELLARS' is the excluded bottler line, so brand evidence is AMBIGUOUS.
entries.unsupportedFieldsNote: Varietal, appellation, vintage, net contents, and government-warning execution are not extracted or evaluated by the current two-field system.
entries.truthLabelProhibition: Truth labels and expectations in this entry are for evaluation and regression only. They MUST NOT be passed to the extractor or production service as inputs; expected declared values may reach downstream deterministic rules only through the existing declared-facts contract.

entries.unavailableReason: No privacy-safe label-artwork derivative with documented provenance could be obtained without network access or exposure of prohibited certificate content. No asset, manifest, or truth transcript is committed. Acquisition is a documented corpus gap: a screened artwork-only crop of TTB ID 19206001000867 with a full source-chain manifest is required before this fixture can be enabled.
